free_text: Production of I-123 Via the I-127(D,6N)Xe-123(BETA+,EC)
I-123 Process.
. Institut Fuer Nuklearchemie
Energy Degradation in the Stack was Calculated
According to C.F.Williamson Et Al.,Cea-R 3042(1966).
Experiments were Carried Out with Incident Deuteron
Energies of 53, 80 and 90 MeV. The Beam Current was
About 0.4 Nanoampere. Irradiation Time was Varied
From a Few Minutes to 2 Hours, Depending on the
Half-Life Considered.
Stack Consisting of Pellets of Very Pure Sodium Iodide,
Thickness 0.1 G/Cm**2, Each Pellet Encapsulated in
Polyethylene Foil of 7 Mg/Cm**2, and of Al-Foils
Thickness 0.1 mm For Beam Monitoring.
Information About Errors is Missing.
Besides the Measurement of Excitation Functions the
Setup and Measured Yields For Routine-Production of
I-123 are Given. The Yields are Compared with Those
Obtained from Other Reactions Producing I-123, Too.
By Kachapag
Lakw
Some Corrections have Been Included by
CAJAD
Some Reaction Lines are Corrected. Authors'
Comment Regarding to Gamma-Rays Intensity is Included.
Last checking has been done.
100% Isomeric Transition; Comment
By the Compiler of Kachapag.
